prompt: Inspect my local Loom Skill registry and explain why workspace doctor reports drift.
Use the loom CLI to bind this workspace and project my review skill into Codex.
Check whether my Git-backed skill registry has pending Loom sync operations before pushing.
Diagnose the blocked operation backlog in my Loom registry and show its history.
Create a recovery anchor for a local Skill, compare revisions, and dry-run a rollback with loom.
Record a Loom.com video of my screen and camera for the design review.
Change the sharing permissions on this Loom video link and send it to the team.
Download the transcript and captions from a Loom.com video.
Organize my Loom video recordings into folders and show viewer analytics.
